changes.value: dispatch_command doesn't emit keymap-changed event after SetKeymapModeCmd executes. KeymapProvider never updates, so menu checked states stay stale.\n\nKey files: commands.rs (dispatch_command), keymap-context.tsx (KeymapProvider), app-shell.tsx (syncMenuToNative)
Bug: OS Settings menu doesn't update when switching keymap via palette
